notes: 3.11.47 — FIX NO AO SO CONG NO NCC (thu-chi ho): phieu danh dau DA THANH TOAN tren form (t.paid/paidDate — he cu) nhung chua co payments[] (luong TT tung phan v3.07.49) van bi tinh CON NO du. Fix TU LANH thuan doc: opPaidTotal — payments rong + phieu da danh dau TT → coi da tra du; phieu tra do (payments co phan) khong dung. So NCC ghi nhan '✓ TT (tren phieu)' canh chip ho so, khong hieu nham Nhap=chua tra. He qua dung: KPI con no ve no that, nut Thanh toan an voi phieu da TT, filter Con no sach. KHONG doi du lieu. Rollback=3.10.41.
